title: Calculator Mod
description: A simple client-side calculator, easy to use!
body:
Super simple mod that gives you ability to calculate anything fast, without leaving the game!

This also gives more immersion to the game! When you open a calculator screen, click the buttons - it's unbeliveable!

![In-game preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e1a1c5ccb581d8f5bd2225c3420cccb054d68aee.png)

_**THIS MOD USES [EXP4J](https://github.com/fasseg/exp4j) LIBRARY TO CALCULATE ALL MATH!**_
